title: Zown Heavy Duty, Injection Mold Folding Chair with Comfortable Contoured Back, Black, 8 Pack
features: All Zown products require a 3-4 week lead time before shipping.

COSCO Commercial Products offering the ZOWN Classic Collection heavy duty injection mold folding chair with comfortable contoured back constructed of polyethylene and a powder coated steel structure redefines the market for lightweight, folding chairs.
These high-quality, low-maintenance chairs are ideal for any gathering both indoor and outdoor, making them versatile for every occasion.
